# Minecraft Bedrock Edition – com.mojang.minecraftpe
# options.txt liegt im External Storage: /sdcard/Android/data/com.mojang.minecraftpe/
# Kein Root erforderlich! Cheats: difficulty SET 0 | render_distance SET 12

fov:70
